FROM golang:1.22-alpine AS builder

WORKDIR /build
COPY app/ .

RUN go build -o split-brain .

FROM alpine:3.20

RUN apk add --no-cache bash coreutils git && \
    git config --global user.email "bench@needle-bench.cc" && \
    git config --global user.name "needle-bench"

COPY --from=builder /build/split-brain /usr/local/bin/split-brain

WORKDIR /app

COPY . .
RUN chmod +x test.sh

# Install Go toolchain in final image so agent can rebuild
RUN apk add --no-cache go && \
    rm -rf /var/cache/ap

FROM split-brain-leader-election:latest
TOOL shell
TOOL file:read
TOOL file:edit
LIMIT turns 60
LIMIT tokens 400000
LIMIT wall_clock 1200

# split-brain-leader-election

## Project

A Go implementation of a leader election protocol for a 5-node distributed cluster. Nodes communicate via message passing and elect a single leader using a voting mechanism similar to Raft. The system includes a network simulation layer that can introduce partitions to test fault tolerance.

## Symptoms

When a network partition splits the cluster into two groups, the safety check reports that multiple nodes believe they are the leader simultaneously. T

#!/bin/sh
# Test for split-brain in leader election under network partition.
# A correct implementation must never elect two leaders simultaneously.

set -e

FAIL=0

echo "=== Split-Brain Leader Election Test ==="

# Run the safety check multiple times — the simulation is probabilistic
for round in 1 2 3; do
    echo "--- Round $round ---"
    if ! split-brain check; then
        echo "FAIL: Split-brain detected in round $round"
        FAIL=1
        break
    fi
    echo "Round $round: OK"
don

final_test_output:
#!/bin/sh
# Test for split-brain in leader election under network partition.
# A correct implementation must never elect two leaders simultaneously.

set -e

FAIL=0

echo "=== Split-Brain Leader Election Test ==="

# Run the safety check multiple times — the simulation is probabilistic
for round in 1 2 3; do
    echo "--- Round $round ---"
    if ! split-brain check; then
        echo "FAIL: Split-brain detected in round $round"
        FAIL=1
        break
    fi
    echo "Round $round: OK"
done

if [ $FAIL -eq 0 ]; then
    echo "PASS: No split-brain detected across all rounds"
    exit 0
else
    echo "FAIL: Leader election allows split-brain under partition"
    exit 1
fi
